name: LinkedIn: Job Detail
summary: Open one LinkedIn job posting by id read-only and return title, company, meta line, full description, and apply type.
description: Open a single LinkedIn job posting (/jobs/view/<id>/) in the existing session and return its details: title, company name and company URL, the meta line (location / posted / applicants), the full job description text, the apply-button label, and the resolved job URL. Read-only: never clicks Apply or Easy Apply. Use linkedin_jobs_search to discover job_ids.

steps.name: Open the job posting in the existing session
Allow the job page to hydrate
Allow the job detail surface to render
Extract job detail (title, company, meta, description, apply_type)

help.summary: Open one LinkedIn job posting by id read-only and return its details.

examples.description: Return the title, company, meta line, description, and apply type for job 3901234567.

returns: Object: { job_id, title, company, company_url, meta, description, apply_type, job_url }. meta is the "<location> · <posted> · <applicants>" line.
notes: Read-only. Never clicks Apply or Easy Apply.
Requires an existing logged-in LinkedIn session.
